text.title: Feature Launch Checklist Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable inputs to a rule from `01-core-rules.xml`. MANDATORY for every methodology — even flat ones — per F-066 DoD.

decision-tree.root-question: Is a user-visible feature shipping in ≤4 weeks with a named owner?

branch.when: user_visible == true AND owner_named == true AND ships_in_days <= 28
user_visible == false OR owner_named == false OR ships_in_days > 28
